pageContext.name: Targaryen Sigil 1oz Silver Medallion
pageContext.description: Today marks the release of the first collectible in the Game of Thrones™ Collection! In partnership with Warner Bros. Consumer Products, New Zealand Mint has created a 1oz pure silver medallion featuring the Targaryen sigil.   Designed as a rectangular badge, one side shows the three-headed red dragon breathing flames on a black background, with the words 'Targaryen' engraved below. The other side features the metallic version of the dragons set within an engraved silver border. Engraving also confirms it as a full 1oz of fine silver and provides the HBO copyright for authentication.   The medallion arrives nestled in black velvet inside a coin case that has been custom-made to complement this unique collectible.   Show your loyalty to your favorite house and order now!
